pitfalls_learned: Drift isNotNull/isNull conflicts with flutter_test matchers - use hide in import
Widget tests with ChangeNotifier streams may timeout - use pump() instead of pumpAndSettle()
Value.absent check: use entry.id.present not entry.id.value == null
withOpacity() deprecated - use withValues(alpha: x)
JOIN queries return JoinedRow - use r.readTable(entity) to extract correct table
Cascade delete requires transaction() for atomicity
Grouped lists need sorted keys for consistent ordering
Check parent list before showing child form dialog - show snackbar if empty
Use null-aware elements [?x] instead of [if (x != null) x] to satisfy use_null_aware_elements lint
Interpolation tests need millisecond precision - use inMilliseconds in both code and test expectations
Self-init provider pattern: call await provider.init() in main() before runApp()
ARB parameterized strings need @key metadata block with placeholders object
fl_chart BarChartGroupData.x requires int - use sequential index, map to month labels in titles
fl_chart has no built-in legend - build custom ChartLegend widget
Multi-meter aggregation: interpolate per-meter independently, then sum - never merge raw readings
FlSpot.nullSpot creates line gaps - guard with .any((s) => s != FlSpot.nullSpot) before rendering
Custom date range + month navigation: navigateMonth() must clear customRange
fl_chart widget tests: can't inspect canvas - focus on data transformation and widget-renders-without-crash
csv package ListToCsvConverter handles quoting/escaping automatically - no manual CSV string building
share_plus needs file on disk - write to getTemporaryDirectory() first, then Share.shareXFiles
Set mimeType on XFile for proper OS handling (e.g., 'text/csv')
Export FAB should be conditional on data availability - hide when no data
context.mounted check required after async operations before showing SnackBar
Year navigation: disable forward arrow at current year with ternary onPressed
Percentage change: guard division by zero when previousYearTotal is 0 or null
12-month x-axis labels crowded on fl_chart - show every-other-month: skip if index % 2 != 0
Extend existing provider for yearly state rather than creating separate provider
Separate provider for pre-aggregated data (smart plugs) — different data flow than interpolated meter data
Other/residual calculation: clamp to max(0, total - tracked), null when no source data
Pie chart percentages: use (tracked + other) as denominator so slices sum to 100%
Grey slice (0xFF9E9E9E) for residual/Other category in pie charts
10-color palette for categorical data, wrap with modulo for > 10 entities
SegmentedButton for period selection (Material 3 standard)
PieChart donut shape: centerSpaceRadius 40, sectionsSpace 2, startDegreeOffset -90
